'''Godt''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who owed his rise in rank to [[Sien Sovv]]. He later fought in the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
